title: Files, Descriptors, Locks, and RAII-Like C Patterns · Failure Case: Resource Not Memory
summary: A service reload path owns heap buffers, FILE streams, descriptors, sockets, and mutexes across cancellation and errors. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem resource not memory increment in uniform resource-lifetime wrapper. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model external handles as scarce lifetime-bound resources even when their storage is not heap memory.
Relate generational and concurrent collection to write barriers, mutator cooperation, pause, throughput, and memory tradeoffs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Resource Not Memory · Theory Resource Not Memory
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 3650. Produce bounded C evidence to release nested resources once in reverse acquisition order; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates.
